# bool / text-cast

The **bool** type's text‚Üítyped SQL cast capability: contributes
`Fields.ValueTextCast` (server runtime) presenting a custom DataView column's raw
`TEXT` storage value as `(${c})::boolean`, so server-delegated filter predicates
and ORDER BY / keyset seek compare it as a boolean. Resolved by exact token
through `resolveFieldValueTextCast("bool")`.
